use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF AMYOTROPHIC LATERAL SCLEROSIS (ALS) IN ADULTS WHO HAVE A MUTATION IN THE SUPEROXIDE DISMUTASE 1 (SOD1) GENE

indications.text:
QALSODY is indicated for the treatment of amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS) in adults who
have a mutation in the superoxide dismutase 1 (SOD1) gene. This indication is approved under
accelerated approval based on reduction in plasma neurofilament light chain (NfL) observed in
patients treated with...
